title: READDI protocol: Crystallisation of CHIKV nsP3 macrodomain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9rjvo","text":"Chikungunya virus (CHIKV) causes severe fever, rash and debilitating joint pain that can last for months or even years. Millions of people have been infected with CHIKV, mostly in low- and middle-income countries, and the virus continues to spread into new areas due to the geographical expansion of its mosquito hosts. The crystallization protocol and buffer conditions used to obtain reproducible Chikungunya Virus nsP3 macrodomain crystals suitable for XChem fragment screening.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":456,"length":5}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"8A3F363AA0AB48338B6BAEF8047A4CC5","url":"https://www.diamond.ac.uk/Instruments/Mx/Fragment-Screening.html"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4gd8v","text":"Follow all handling warning for the chemicals used in the crystalllisation screen composition.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"f7voj","text":"SwissCI 3 lens crystallization plates https://swissci.com/product/3-lens-crystallisation-plate/ Codes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":96,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":38,"length":57}],"data":{}},{"key":"4a6p1","text":"Midi: UVXPO-3LENS 3W96T-PS 3W96T-UVP","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e0iau","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cupb6","text":"Molecular Dimensions 'The BCS Screen Single Reagent' 2-44: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":20}],"data":{}},{"key":"32qqu","text":"0.1 M Tris (pH 7.8), 0.1 M Potassium thiocyanate, 0.1 M Sodium bromide, 25 % v/v PEG Smear Broad, Catalog # MDSR-104-2-44","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"chrqf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"colr0","text":"Purified CHIKV Mac protein (11 mg/mL) in 25 mM Tris-HCl (pH 7.5), 0.1 M NaCl, 5 % Glycerol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"ACCED8A84DC311EE80FB0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://swissci.com/product/3-lens-crystallisation-plate"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B3C81F89DF0711EEA7150A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://moleculardimensions.com/en/product/65"}}}}
steps: Protein and buffer requirements: 21.6 µL 11 mg/mL Sample 2.88 mL, Crystallisation screen 10.08 µL Sample Seeds, dilution 1:100

Dispense 30 µL, Crystallisation screen into SwissCI 3 lens plate reservoir wells using a 100 µl multi-channel pipette. Dispense 75 nL 11 mg/mL Sample to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 40 nL, Crystallisation screen to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 35 nL, CHIKV Mac Seeds to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Drop ratio: 15:8:7 ratio (75 nl Sample : 40 nl Crystallisation solution: 35 nl Seeds) Final drop volume: 150 nl

Crystallisation screen composition: 0.1 Molarity (M) Tris-NaOH pH 7.8 0.1 Molarity (M) Potassium thiocyanate 0.1 Molarity (M) Sodium bromide 25 % v/v PEG Smear Broad Stock solutions used: 1 Molarity (M) Tris adjusted to pH 7.8 with NaOH 1 Molarity (M) Potassium thiocyanate 1 Molarity (M) Sodium bromide 50% v/v PEG Smear Broad The crystallisation screen can be stored in a duran bottle or aliquoted into 96 deep well block for easy dispensing into SwissCI 3 lens plates. For long term storage keep the Crystallisation screen in the fridge at 4°C.

The crystals reach their maximum size after 24-48 h. Crystals typically form as single crystals at the bottom of the drop or on the drop-air interface. Morphology: typically thin rectangles with pointed ends. Size: ~100 μm in length and ~50 μm in width, depth of the crystals is ~10 μm Appearance : glass shard. Average resolution: 1.5 Å Space group: P3 1 Unit cell: 87 Å, 87 Å, 85 Å 90.00°, 90.00°, 120.00° An example of a drop containing CHIKV macrodomain crystals.

Incubate at 20 °C for 24:00:00, h in Formulatrix Rock Imager. Imaging Schedule : The first images are taken after 12 h and the imaging schedule follows a Fibonacci sequence of days for further collections.

Formulatrix Rock Imager (or incubator of choice) SPT mosquito Mosquito HV (High Volume 16-Channel Robotic Liquid Handler, SPT LabTech, 3097-01057, https://www.sptlabtech.com/products/liquid-handling/mosquito-hv/ ) P100 8 multi-channel pipette SwissCI 3 lens plate
Prepare seed stock: Diamond XChem Seeding Protocol by Peter Marples 1: 100 dilution Sample seeds

Diamond Light Source Unattended Data Collection (UDC) Data Collection Temperature: 100K Detector: DECTRIS EIGER2 X 9M Beamline: I04-1 Wavelength: 0.9212 Å Resolution (Å): 1.64 Beam Size (μm): 60 X 50 Number of images: 3600 Oscillation: 0.10° Exposure (s): 0.0020 Transmission (%): 100 Flux (ph/s): 3.80e+12
creator: Lizbé Koekemoer
